title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
company: Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited:
Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited!
